stemHtml: In accordance with OPS regulations, for a non pressurised aircraft, all occupants of flight deck seats on flight deck duty shall be supplied with supplemental oxygen during:

options.a: the entire flight time at pressure altitudes above 13000 ft
options.b: the entire flight time after 30 minutes at pressure altitudes greater than 10000 ft but not exceeding 13000 ft
options.c: the entire flight time at pressure altitudes above 13000 ft and for any period exceeding 30 minutes at pressure altitudes above 10000 ft but not exceeding 13000 ft
options.d: the entire flight time at pressure altitudes above 10000 ft
